productName: 420 Mini - Dark Chocolate - Sea Salt 2:2:1 CBN:CBD:THC 500mg
description: A chocolatier-style edible with creamy cocoa depth, a polished finish, and the kind of dessert-shop richness that feels far more special than ordinary candy. It blends CBN to help you relax and ease into rest, CBD to keep things calm and balanced, and THC for a classic euphoric lift in a 2:2:1 ratio. The flavor does the inviting, and the cannabis infusion follows with a smooth finish.
